@Nullable public [String](<https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/String.html> "class or interface in java.lang") nextSplit()

Description copied from interface: `[RecordsWithSplitIds](<RecordsWithSplitIds.html#nextSplit\(\)>)`

Moves to the next split. This method is also called initially to move to the first split. Returns null, if no splits are left.
